outcome: Number of patients completing program - psychotherapy vs any control, all populations
source_quote: 42 randomized: 22 IG and 20 CG. Drop-out rates did not differ (95% CI -0.30-0.32) between IG (14%) and CG (15%). With 86% (95% CI 70-100%), the required participation rate of 67% in the intervention group was met. At the 6-month follow-up, 36/42 (86%) participants completed final assessment and 19/22 (86%) the intervention.
